compiled_state.title: RED test: Add approach_viability_concern schema validation tests
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Modify tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh to add RED test cases for approach_viability_concern field:
1. Findings JSON with valid approach_viability_concern (boolean true) passes validation
2. Findings JSON with approach_viability_concern=false passes validation
3. Findings JSON with invalid approach_viability_concern (string instead of boolean) fails
4. Findings JSON without approach_viability_concern passes (optional field)

Test approach: Create JSON fixtures with/without approach_viability_concern, pipe through validate-review-output.sh code-review-dispatch, assert exit codes.

Tests FAIL RED because validate-review-output.sh does not recognize approach_viability_concern in optional_top.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file contains approach_viability_concern test cases
  Verify: grep -c 'approach_viability_concern' tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] New tests fail RED
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-validate-review-output.sh 2>&1 | grep -q FAIL
